Home / Projects / UTC Office Building
Project Type Commercial Renovation
Location Lacey, WA
Sector Office / Commercial

UTC Office Building

Commercial renovations present unique challenges that differ significantly from ground-up construction. The UTC Office Building project in Lacey, Washington, showcases our expertise in transforming existing office space into modern, efficient work environments that meet contemporary business needs.

This comprehensive renovation involved far more than cosmetic updates. We reimagined the interior layout to create better space utilization and workflow, upgraded mechanical and electrical systems for improved efficiency and comfort, enhanced lighting with modern fixtures and controls, and replaced finishes throughout with durable, professional-grade materials that will serve the building for years to come.

Working in the South Sound region outside Olympia, we delivered a project that balances the cost-effectiveness of renovation with the performance of new construction. The result is an office building that offers modern amenities, comfortable working conditions, and professional presentation—all achieved through strategic renovation rather than costly new construction.

Project Highlights

  • Comprehensive commercial office renovation and modernization
  • Redesigned interior layouts improving space efficiency and flow
  • Upgraded HVAC and electrical systems for comfort and energy efficiency
  • Modern lighting design enhancing workspace quality
  • Professional-grade finishes throughout including flooring, ceilings, and millwork
  • Code compliance updates meeting current building standards
  • Project delivery maintaining value and minimizing downtime

The UTC Office Building demonstrates that thoughtful renovation can deliver results comparable to new construction at a fraction of the cost. It's an approach that makes sense for building owners seeking to modernize their properties and attract quality tenants in competitive commercial markets.

Project Images

We specialize in transforming existing office buildings into modern, efficient workspaces.
